positive: A minimalist, highly stylized celestial fox spirit curled up on a crescent moon. The fox has long, flowing tails made of iridescent stardust and glowing ethereal light. The background is a deep, gradient indigo and violet nebula, contrasting with glowing accents of teal and gold. Use clean silhouettes and strong negative space. Style: Japanese folklore illustration meets Art Nouveau etching, highly refined line art, digital painting, perfect symmetry, flat composition suitable for apparel printing. Lighting: Luminescent, glowing from within the fox and moon. Composition: Central, vertically balanced.
negative: blur, amateur, signature, watermark, logo, text, noise, artifacts, disfigured, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy background, grainy, low resolution, hyperdetailed, photorealism
